title: Pilosella rojowskii
taxonomy: Pilosella rojowskii is classified in the kingdom Plantae, specifically within the family Asteraceae. It belongs to the genus Pilosella, which is a group of plants that are commonly known as mouse-ear hawk's-beard. The species Pilosella rojowskii is further divided into various subspecies based on its geographical distribution and morphological characteristics. As part of the Asteraceae family, Pilosella rojowskii is closely related to other plants like dandelions and thistles. Pilosella rojowskii is also known to be a member of the tribe Cichorieae.
uses: Pilosella rojowskii is a rare and lesser-known plant species.
